filters.description: Optional property-group filters that define which incoming error events should be suppressed. Omit this field or provide an empty `values` array to create a match-all suppression rule.

key.description: The key should be the flag ID

operator.description: Only flag_evaluates_to operator is allowed for flag dependencies

value.description: The value can be true, false, or a variant name

sampling_rate.description: Fraction of matching events to suppress. Use `1.0` to suppress all matching events.
